transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my main sewer line has low water pressure and it's getting bad! This is Patricia Hall at 101 Pine Street. Dispatcher: Okay Patricia, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 101 Pine Street right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: main sewer line has low water pressure
